title: CI Fails in 'release' task
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

After testing is complete and successful, a new 'release' task runs to gather up cached binary zip files, and publish this to a public location.  When no cached binary releases are found, this process fails by original-design.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. No additional steps required.

**Describe the results you received:**

```
...cut...
[+0001s] ************************************************
[+0001s] >>>>> Error: No release archives found in CI cache, expecting at least one.
[+0001s] ************************************************
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

```
...cut...
[+0048s] Operation completed over 4 objects/120.2 MiB.                                    
[+0048s] Successfully uploaded archives:
[+0048s]     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-master-releases/libpod-master-fedora-30-amd64.zip
[+0048s]     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-master-releases/libpod-master-fedora-29-amd64.zip
[+0048s]     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-master-releases/podman-remote-master-windows-cc-amd64.zip
[+0048s]     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-master-releases/podman-remote-master-darwin-cc-amd64.zip
```
